summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Driver Checkpoint app (Live Map + Manifests + Checkpoints). All 11 backend pytest cases passed and all UI flows verified end-to-end (clock, leaflet map, GPS, manifest form, checkpoint add, persistence after reload).
critical_code_review_comments: react-leaflet MapContainer does not forward arbitrary props (like data-testid) to its DOM element. Fixed by moving data-testid='leaflet-map' to wrapping <div className='map-wrap'>. Worth keeping in mind for any future test attrs on react-leaflet components.
DELETE /api/checkpoints with no manifest_id query deletes ALL checkpoints across all manifests. Consider requiring manifest_id or restricting to admin to avoid accidental wipes in production.
No pagination on GET /api/manifests and GET /api/checkpoints beyond a hard limit (200). Fine for MVP, but flag for future.
Backend uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI in favor of lifespan handlers. Non-blocking, but worth modernizing.
Frontend uses absolute @ path aliases (@/App.css). Verified webpack/CRA config supports it via current builds — keep an eye on that if migrating tooling.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/Dashboard.jsx (moved data-testid='leaflet-map' from MapContainer to wrapping div so it is findable in the DOM)
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed manifest 'TEST B 9999 ZZ' + 2 checkpoints, then complete the manifest and DELETE the test checkpoints in the cleanup step. UI test created a checkpoint under existing active manifest 'B 1234 XX'; both that checkpoint and the prior one were deleted via DELETE /api/checkpoints cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_driver_checkpoint.py and cover root, manifests CRUD (create/list/active/complete + 404), checkpoint create x2, sorted listing, and DELETE cleanup. They self-clean by completing manifest and deleting checkpoints. To re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_driver_checkpoint.py -v. The frontend dashboard already has all required data-testids: dashboard-root, dash-header, clock-time, clock-date, leaflet-map, nopol-display, nopol-card, active-manifest, form-manifest, input-nopol/driver/asal/tujuan/muatan, btn-submit-manifest, btn-add-checkpoint, btn-complete-manifest, checkpoint-timeline, checkpoint-count, checkpoint-item-{idx}, checkpoint-empty, toast, gps-warning, coord-chip. Geolocation must be granted at context level for Playwright; clock displays Indonesian day/month names; map tiles take ~7s to render.
rca of the issue: Initial run had a single Playwright failure: data-testid='leaflet-map' attribute not found in DOM. Root cause: react-leaflet's MapContainer wraps the underlying div via createContainerComponent and does NOT pass through arbitrary HTML attributes (data-testid was dropped). Mitigation: moved data-testid='leaflet-map' to the wrapping <div className='map-wrap'> in Dashboard.jsx. Re-ran UI test — all assertions passed including tile load (15 tiles), clock updates per second, Indonesian day name, manifest active summary, checkpoint count increment, CP-N label, and persistence after page reload.
